key_insights.insight: Entrepreneurship is a completely all-consuming endeavor that requires constant attention and effort.
key_insights.quote: It is a constant, constant, all-consuming story. That means I wake up, I check peanut and I check my emails. That's before I do anything else, before I go to sleep. Sometimes in the middle of the night, I do the same um it is completely all-consuming

key_insights.insight: It's important to validate an app idea and test the market before investing heavily in building the app.
key_insights.quote: There are ways to test what you want to build without having to go all in with the app, right? That's just a fact.

key_insights.insight: Self-doubt can be a consuming force for entrepreneurs, but it's crucial to keep it in check by focusing on the potential upside.
key_insights.quote: Self-doubt is something that can consume you if you don't keep it in check. And I suppose it's just having that element of what's the worst that can happen?

key_insights.insight: One can change their mindset to become more entrepreneurial by challenging oneself to embrace risk.
key_insights.quote: I never, I didn't always have this mindset and i think it's really important to note that you can change your mindset...it's completely the opposite when you're an entrepreneur, you see it and you do it anyway.

key_insights.insight: Women face unique challenges in entrepreneurship, but having conversations and creating opportunities can enable them to succeed.
key_insights.quote: I don't think it should be harder for women. I think there are obvious challenges. And I think we're having conversations trying to make it better.

key_insights.insight: It is critical to act with integrity and surround yourself with people who share your values.
key_insights.quote: I want people to know that I act with integrity and I want to act with integrity and I want to work with people who do um and that is really important

key_insights.insight: The sacrifices involved in being a founder, such as personal relationships, finances, and social life, should be considered carefully.
key_insights.quote: There are sacrifices in terms of personal relationships. It will take its toll on some of your friendships.

key_insights.insight: Money can provide security but the integrity of work ethic and the sense of achievement are more closely tied to happiness.
key_insights.quote: It's not happiness. It's linked to security. But what's more tied to happiness is like the integrity of work ethic and the integrity of feeling like, yeah, I did that for us. And you can do it for you.

actionable_advice.advice: Test your app idea before investing heavily in development.
actionable_advice.how_to: Explore ways to validate the idea without building the full app, such as mockups, landing pages, or pilot programs.
Use a sleep app like Calm, avoid checking emails past 11pm, turn phone to airplane mode and reduce alcohol consumption.

actionable_advice.advice: If you're a young woman looking to start a business in tech seek advice from others.
actionable_advice.how_to: Speak to as many people as you can, shadow someone, get information and learn from people.

actionable_advice.advice: Do not create a product for yourself, get feedback from your user base.
actionable_advice.how_to: Speak to one woman and then every time get that woman to introduce you to another woman to get feedback from outside your own network.

memorable_stories: The story of Peanut's recognition at Apple's WWDC, symbolizing their impact on women and mothers.
The anecdote about forgetting fancy dress day at son's school, a relatable struggle for working mothers.
Discussion of personal relationship breakdown impacting founder's self esteem and vision for the company.
contrarian_claims: It's a myth that being a 'good' person is synonymous with weakness or ineffectiveness in business.
While there are some obvious challenges for women in entrepreneurship, it should not be harder and things are getting better.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - E32 Michelle Kennedy - From Matchmaking to Motherhood
